description: This file discloses all external API calls used in the project, as required by QVAC hackathon rules.
note: MedPsy Clinic runs entirely on-device using QVAC SDK. No cloud APIs, no external services, no data leaves the device. All AI inference (LLM, STT, TTS, embeddings, RAG) is performed locally.

external_dependencies.name: Hugging Face
external_dependencies.purpose: Model weight downloads only (one-time, during setup)

runtime_apis: NONE — All inference runs locally via QVAC SDK
